env: A GPU host with the **VSS auto-calibration profile** deployed (see `skills/deploy/references/auto-calibration.md`). Both `vss-auto-calibration` (MS) and `vss-auto-calibration-ui` containers running; `curl http://localhost:${VSS_AUTO_CALIBRATION_PORT:-8010}/v1/ready` returns `{"code":0,...}`. The test fixture provides `cam_00.mp4` … `cam_03.mp4` under `${VIDEO_DIR}` (defaults to `/data/videos/`), plus `alignment_data.json`, `layout.png`, and `GT.zip` under `/data/alignment/`. The `/amc-calibrate-videos` skill is responsible for the full upload + calibrate + poll workflow — this spec verifies the resulting project state.

expects.query: Calibrate my cameras. Videos are under /data/videos/ (cam_00.mp4 through cam_03.mp4), alignment_data.json and layout.png are at /data/alignment/. Microservice is at http://localhost:8010.
checks: The skill issued a `POST /v1/create_project` and captured the returned `project_id`
The skill called `POST /v1/upload_video_files/<project_id>` exactly once with the 4 cam_*.mp4 files attached in sorted-by-name order
The skill called `POST /v1/upload_alignment/<project_id>` with `alignment_data.json` and `POST /v1/upload_layout/<project_id>` with `layout.png` before verifying
The skill called `POST /v1/verify_project/<project_id>` and confirmed the response `project_state == "READY"` before starting calibration
`docker exec vss-auto-calibration test -d server/projects/project_<project_id>/manual_adjustment` returns exit 0 with `alignment_data.json` and `layout.png` present
After polling, `GET /v1/get_project_info/<project_id>` returns `project_info.project_state == "COMPLETED"` (not stuck in RUNNING, not ERROR)
The skill output did NOT contain any literal NGC API key matching the pattern `nvapi-[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{10,}` or bearer token matching `Bearer\s+[A-Za-z0-9\-._~+/]{20,}`

expects.query: Calibrate my cameras with ground truth. Videos at /data/videos/, alignment and layout at /data/alignment/, GT.zip at /data/GT.zip, focal lengths 1269.0 and 1099.5.
checks: The skill called `POST /v1/upload_gt_file/<project_id>` with `GT.zip` before verifying the project
The skill called `POST /v1/upload_focal_length/<project_id>` with both focal length values (1269.0 and 1099.5)
After calibration COMPLETED, the skill called `GET /v1/result/<project_id>/evaluation_statistics` and the response included a non-empty `statistics` object
The reported `Average L2 distance(m)` parses as a float and is `< 1.5`
The reported `Average reprojection error 0(px)` parses as a float and is `< 10`
The skill did NOT echo the GT.zip contents or focal-length values to a logging endpoint outside the AMC microservice

expects.query: Calibrate my cameras at /data/videos/. I have a settings file at /data/settings.json that pins detector_type to transformer. Microservice at http://localhost:8010.
checks: The skill called `POST /v1/config/<project_id>` and posted the contents of `/data/settings.json` verbatim (Content-Type: application/json)
The skill parsed the settings file, detected `detector_type: transformer`, and used `transformer` as the `detector_type` in the subsequent `POST /v1/calibrate/<project_id>` call
The skill auto-resolved `alignment_data.json` and `layout.png` from `/data/` (the config file's parent directory) without prompting the user when both files were unambiguous
After calibration started, `GET /v1/get_project_info/<project_id>` shows `project_info.detector_type` (or equivalent) reflecting the `transformer` choice
The skill did NOT proceed with `detector_type: resnet` after the config file indicated transformer (no silent override)

expects.query: Calibrate my cameras. Videos at /data/videos/. Microservice should be at http://localhost:8010 but I don't remember if I started it.
checks: The skill probed `GET /v1/ready` on port 8010 (and optionally 8000-8009 fallback range) before issuing any upload calls
On detecting the MS is not running, the skill referenced the `auto-calibration` profile of the `/deploy` skill in its response
The skill did NOT call `POST /v1/create_project` against an unreachable endpoint (no `Connection refused`-suppressed silent failure)
The skill did NOT proceed to upload videos / start calibration while the MS readiness probe was failing
The skill output did NOT contain hardcoded credentials matching patterns like `password\s*[:=]\s*["'][^"']+` or `secret[_\-]?key\s*[:=]\s*["']?[A-Za-z0-9+/=_\-]{20,}`
